title: Wayfarer: a quick self-tour
description: This example tour walks through Wayfarer's own source. Point the app at this file's GitHub blob URL to see it rendered.

stops.title: Parsing the tour URL
stops.content: Every tour starts from a GitHub **blob URL** passed as `?tour=`. We pull `owner`, `repo`, `branch`, and the file path out of it, and remember the tour file's directory as `baseDir` so relative paths resolve correctly.

stops.title: Resolving relative file paths
stops.content: Stop `file` paths are relative to the tour file's directory. `resolvePath` joins them against `baseDir` and collapses `.` / `..` segments, so a stop can reference `../src/index.ts` and we still fetch the right raw file.

stops.title: Rendering a stop
stops.content: Each stop renders its markdown `content`, then — if it names a `file` — fetches that file's raw contents, syntax-highlights it with Shiki, and emphasizes the `line`..`endLine` range.
